spec.globalPrompt: Create a photorealistic cinematic illustration for a modern web novel. Keep lighting, materials, anatomy, and faces grounded in live-action realism. Maintain a unified realistic visual language across all generated assets.
spec.globalNegativePrompt: anime, manga, cel shading, cartoon, illustration with flat shading, text, logo, watermark, collage, split panel, deformed anatomy, low detail face, extra limbs

titleImage.prompt: A final cover image for the novel Hanamogura: the flower-crowned mole traveler walking a dawn road after surviving a long forbidden pilgrimage, with distant hints of the wind-funeral city, suspended white greenhouse gardens, and a far black gate left behind. Quiet magical realism, bittersweet but hopeful, cinematic scale, centered lone traveler, emphasis on lived responsibility rather than triumph.
titleImage.negativePrompt: generic fantasy battle pose, mascot cuteness, crowded cast montage, visible title text, direct horror monster, overly cute storybook tone
